details.IncidentDetail: "[13] 97-206 UTL FOR THE VEH AT THE REST AREA -- 97 W/ RP [Shared]"
"[2] 97-206 VEH HAD SIDE SWIPED THE VV "
"[38] 6-30 REQUEST THAT THA LOG BE OPEN FOR DAY SHIFT"
"[37] 6-30 #2 LN CLOSED JEO // RAMSEY IS 97 // TRAFFIC IS GETTING RELEASED"
"[36] RUNNKNG A BREAK WB TO ALLOW CT TO SET THE COMNES FOR THE CLOSURE OF THE OFR"
"[32] REQ CT FOR A CLOSURE OF THE WEST BOUND OFR AT CORN SPRINGS [Shared]"
"[22] 6-30 TRL IS FULLY ENGULFED // TRACTOR NOT ON FIRE [Shared]"
"[21] 6-30 97 IN AREA TRUCK ON OFR WB ON RHS (FIRE 97) [Shared]"
"[13] SEMI TK IS ON THE RHS OF THE OFR [Shared]"
"[12] REAR END OF TRLR IS ON FIRE [Shared]"
"[110] CLANCYS STATES THE DRIVER DOESN'T WANT TO GET OUT OF THE BIG RIG "
"[106] EVERYTHING ELSE APPEARS TO BE A CIVIL ISSUE BT THE 1185 COMPANY AND THE DRIVER/AND HIS COMANY"
"[89] A85-003 CLEAN UP IS ALL ON R/S - NEG FOR UNIT TO 1023"
"[83] ^CT631 ADVS 98 W/ HARD CLSR// #2 LANE IS BACK OPEN AND TRAILER IS UPRIGHT"
"[77] ^1021 CT HQ// NA AND LEFT VM"
"[76] ^CT631 LL - ADV PER CHP REQ WILL CLSED #2 LN ON WB"
"[75] B85-003 CT WILL DO LN CLOSURE IN APPROX 2 HRS WILL NOTIFY"
"[74] B85-003 SPOKE TO 1185 THEY WILL HAVE TO GO INTO #2 LN TO MOVE TRL"
"[68] ^CT631 LL - ADV ANOTHER TWO COMING FROM EL CAJON -- ETA 1 1/2 HRS."
"[64] 1185 CANNOT FIND SERV ORDER FOR LKR TRANS"
"[62] SAFER RD RESCUE TOLD LYDIA THEY WILL BRING 3-4 WRECKERS TO UPRIGHT TRL//ASSURED HER THEY ARE ABLE TO HANDLE"
"[61] LYDIA ALSO HAS ANOTHER DRIVER W/ TRK/TRL ER TO UNLOAD AND RELOAD IF NEEDED ETA 20 MINS"
"[60] LYDIA HAS SAFER ROAD RESCUE IS HD TOW CO ER 888-412-0297"
"[57] 85-S1 HAZMAT CREW IS ENRT AND HAVE 1185 BUT THEY NEED HELP TO UNLOAD THE TRLR AND UPRIGHT IT"
"[55] ^CT631 -- THE TOW COMPANY OO RIVERSIDE HAS BEEN CANCELLED; NEW COMPANY WILL BE COMING OO BRAWLEY "
"[54] ^SUPT/MATT BECKLER CB; CPZ HAZMAT INFO and HAS BEEN IN TOUCH W/ CT631 DIRECT"
"[49] ^1021 SUPT/JR MA'AKE and SUPT/MATT BECKLER AS ALTS FOR CT602-4 / NA FOR EITHER // WILL EMAIL HAZMAT INFO TO CT HAZMAT COORDINATOR"

"[46] ^CT631 -- RESP PTY HAS MADE ARRANGEMENTS W/ TOW COMPANY TO UPRIGHT THE TLR; WILL BE OO RIVERSIDE DUE TO THE WEIGHT // EFR ENVIRONMENTAL IS ENRT TO HANDLE CLEAN UP // PRELIMINARILY 10 GALS OF BATTERY ACID INTO THE DIRT, BUT HARD TO CONFIRM W/ THE TLR ON ITS SIDE"
"[44] ^CT631 -- 1097, WB 8 AT APPROX MPM 24.6 // TRAILER ON ITS SIDE ON THE SHOULDER / LNS OPEN"
"[37] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from 1182-Trfc Collision-No Inj to HAZMAT-Hazardous Materials Inc by CHP [Shared]"
"[21] B85-003 PRTY HAS PRIV TOW ER/ALLIED HD TOWING ETA 2-3 HRS [Shared]"
"[32] [Appended, 15:32:12] [10] PER INV HELP WITH OFF LOAD THE CARGO / NEG 1125"
"[29] [Appended, 15:32:12] [7] HELP ENRT TO SWAP TRLR ETA 2 HRS"
"[14] DRIVER OF BIG RIG BACKED INTO TRLR AND KNOCKED IT OVER [Shared]"
"[11] LE:RP ADV HE WILL BE WORKING ON GETTING 1185 OUT THERE [Shared]"
"[7] [Appended, 15:08:39] [2] PETERBUILT HAULING TRLR WAS 1126 ON RHS W/BO TIRE"
